---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description-meta: "Curriculum vitae of Connor L. Brown: education, research experience, publications, presentations, and funding."
open-graph:
  description: "Curriculum vitae of Connor L. Brown: education, research experience, publications, presentations, and funding."
twitter-card:
  description: "Curriculum vitae of Connor L. Brown: education, research experience, publications, presentations, and funding."
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

<a class="btn btn-primary mb-3" href="/CBrown_CV.pdf" download>{{< fa download >}} Download PDF</a>

<object data="/CBrown_CV.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" style="height: calc(100vh - 140px); min-height: 600px; border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);">
  <p>This browser can't display embedded PDFs. <a href="/CBrown_CV.pdf">Download the CV (PDF)</a> instead.</p>
</object>
